name: localskills
description: Regional AI skills for real-world tasks — start with NZ; built around correctness, narrow permissions, and visible audits.

plugins.name: companies-office-annual-return
plugins.description: Prepares your NZ Companies Office annual return — drafts the confirmation fields and flags anything that needs updating before you file.

plugins.name: companies-register-search
plugins.description: Looks up NZ companies on the Companies Register. Due diligence, director / shareholder checks, liquidation flags.

plugins.name: ird-gst-return-helper
plugins.description: Drafts NZ IRD GST returns from receipts and invoices. Computes Box 5–15 figures for the GST101A. Does not file.

plugins.name: mymsd-form-helper
plugins.description: Helps you fill in NZ MSD (Work & Income) forms for benefits, accommodation supplement, and reviews. Drafts only — you submit.

plugins.name: nz-post-tracking-helper
plugins.description: Tracks NZ Post / CourierPost parcels from your tracking numbers and drafts returns labels and missing-parcel claims.

plugins.name: paknsave-price-tracker
plugins.description: Tracks PAK'nSAVE NZ shelf prices across your saved staples list and tells you when something jumps.

plugins.name: powerswitch-analyser
plugins.description: Analyses your NZ power bill and tells you if a different retailer would be cheaper. Uses Consumer NZ's Powerswitch logic locally.

plugins.name: resource-consent-checker
plugins.description: Sanity-checks whether your proposed building work needs a resource consent or building consent under NZ council rules.

plugins.name: trademe-listing-drafter
plugins.description: Drafts a complete Trade Me marketplace listing from photos and a one-line description.

plugins.name: woolworths-refund-helper
plugins.description: Navigate Olive (Woolworths NZ's chatbot) to get a CGA-compliant refund for poor-quality grocery deliveries.

plugins.name: auckland-transport-helper
plugins.description: Helps with AT HOP card, journey planning, fare disputes, and the AT Mobile / website friction points.

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Co-pilots a real task with you (Computer Use), then generates a complete Localskills.ai skill folder from the workflow it just ran.
